channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Calgary Stampeders and Montreal Alouettes Rivalry Intensifies in CFL Match
item.description: The Calgary Stampeders and Montreal Alouettes faced off in a highly anticipated CFL rematch, with the Alouettes securing a 37-30 victory. The game highlighted the intense rivalry between the Philpot b...

item.title: Understanding Hasad-Envy: Its Impact and Spiritual Dangers in the Ummah
item.description: The article discusses the harmful effects of hasad-envy (jealousy) in Islamic teachings, highlighting its destructive nature on the heart and soul. It outlines three levels of envy: mild dissatisfacti...

item.title: Babulal Marandi demands judicial inquiry into JSDMS scam allegations
item.description: Leader of Opposition Babulal Marandi has written to Chief Minister Hemant Soren demanding a judicial inquiry into alleged financial scams in the Jharkhand Skill Development Mission Society (JSDMS). Th...

item.title: Chris Hayes Warns of Close Election Margins in Texas Amid Midterm Concerns
item.description: Chris Hayes, host of 'All In,' discusses his concerns about the 2026 midterm elections and the potential for close races in key states like Texas. He highlights the risks posed by President Donald Tru...

item.title: Andy Burnham's leadership transition: Challenges and preparedness
item.description: The article explores Andy Burnham's ascension as Labour leader, focusing on his team's efforts to prepare for a potential government. It highlights the three-phase plan for his first two weeks in offi...

item.title: Supreme Court mandates medical treatment for sexually assaulted children
item.description: The Supreme Court has clarified that doctors cannot refuse treatment to children who have been sexually assaulted, emphasizing the legal obligation to provide medical care. The ruling underscores the ...

item.title: DeChambeau faces penalty over golf rules controversy at British Open
item.description: American golf star Bryson DeChambeau has been penalised two strokes at the British Open after officials ruled his actions on the fifth hole violated golf regulations. The incident occurred when DeCham...

item.title: Clacton By-Election Sees Record 34 Candidates Amid Political Controversy
item.description: A total of 34 candidates have been confirmed for the Clacton constituency by-election, triggered by the resignation of Nigel Farage. The Reform UK leader resigned as MP on 7 July following increased s...

item.title: Trump Accuses Canada of Negligence Over Wildfire Smoke Impacting U.S.
item.description: President Donald Trump expressed fury at Canada over wildfires and smoke affecting air quality in the Midwest and Northeast. On Truth Social, he accused Canada of failing to maintain its forests and b...

item.title: Legal battle over alleged Bishnoi gang member's release and public safety risks
item.description: A lawyer for Canada's Minister of Public Safety argued that releasing Karamveer Singh, an accused murderer linked to senior Bishnoi gang members, poses too great a public safety risk. FBI documents al...

item.title: Sigabo Episode 20: Gabo's Sacrifice to Save Friends
item.description: The article discusses Episode 20 of the Philippine television series 'Sigabo,' focusing on the character Gabo's selfless act of enduring personal pain to rescue his friends. The episode highlights the...

item.title: Smirnoff Partners with Big Brother Naija for Season 11 Sponsorship
item.description: Smirnoff Ice, a global ready-to-drink brand, has reaffirmed its sponsorship of Big Brother Naija (BBNaija) Season 11, promising fans unforgettable moments and refreshing experiences. The partnership a...

item.title: Federal judge rejects Trump's attempt to erase Jan. 6 riot convictions
item.description: A federal judge has rejected former President Donald Trump's effort to erase convictions related to the January 6 Capitol riot, emphasizing the importance of preserving historical accuracy. U.S. Distr...

item.title: Wildfires Rage Across Ontario and Manitoba, Spreading Smoke to the USA
item.description: Massive wildfires are currently raging across Ontario and Manitoba, Canada, producing thick plumes of smoke that are spreading southward into the United States. The situation, updated on July 18, 2026...

item.title: Brazil and Poland Support Tanzania's Digital Growth Initiatives
item.description: The article highlights international collaboration in advancing Tanzania's digital transformation. Brazil and Poland have expressed support for President John Magufuli's (Dar) initiatives aimed at boo...

item.title: Spain and Argentina Clash in FIFA World Cup 2026 Final
item.description: The FIFA World Cup 2026 final between Spain and Argentina promises to be a historic showdown. Spain, known as La Roja, reached the final by defeating France 2-0 in the semi-finals, maintaining an unbe...

item.title: Saskatchewan and Ottawa agree to keep research farms operational despite federal plans to close them
item.description: The Saskatchewan government has entered into a memorandum of understanding (MOU) with the federal agriculture department to ensure the continued operation of two research farms in Indian Head and Scot...

item.title: Investigation into stolen precious stones leads to arrests of former police officers
item.description: The Independent Police Investigative Directorate (IPID) has arrested a fifth suspect in connection with allegations that precious stones seized during a police operation were unlawfully removed. The c...

item.title: ADC Announces Deputy Governorship Candidate for Kebbi State Ahead of 2027 Election
item.description: The African Democratic Congress (ADC) in Kebbi State has officially named Musa Zagi as the deputy governorship candidate for the upcoming 2027 election. This decision was made public through a stateme...

item.title: Lauren Laverne announces chronic blood and bone marrow condition
item.description: BBC Radio 6 Music presenter Lauren Laverne has disclosed she has been diagnosed with smouldering myeloma, a rare asymptomatic blood and bone marrow disorder linked to blood cancer. While the condition...
